title: OHO Datasets Availability Summary (Reference)
description: Reference matrix (as of 2026-05-05) of the SSA OHO public data files: the five primary reports (ALJ disposition, hearing-office workload, average wait time, dispositions-per-day ranking, processing-time ranking), their field counts, archive availability (monthly FY2011–FY2025), export formats, state-aggregation support, and extraction status/blockers. Also lists additional OHO reports and the hearing-office-to-state mapping. Useful for consumers deciding which OHO dataset to use and how far back archives go.

source.title: OHO Public Data Files — availability summary

license: U.S. public domain (SSA structure; project-authored summary)
notes: Reference doc (not a primary dataset): an availability/coverage matrix documenting the official OHO public-data report structure and archive depth. Carded as reference metadata; tier Authoritative because it documents official OHO dataset structure and availability. Related-linked to the OHO datasets it describes. Source URL is the OHO datasets root.
